description: List of donations (?) collected for the first four months of 5583 = 1822/23 CE (or perhaps 5553 AM). All the entries refer to "the little girl of X," X being Yaʿaqov Kohen, Binyamin Qodesh, Yaʿīsh Ḥaddād, David Naʿīm, and others. The heading mentions the "מערבים" perhaps as a reference to the Maghrebi congregation.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
